tmpfs            3279688     1972   3277716   1% /run
efivarfs             256       89       163  36% /sys/firmware/efi/efivars
/dev/nvme0n1p2 479079112 55654800 399014920  13% /
tmpfs           16398436    36424  16362012   1% /dev/shm
tmpfs               5120       20      5100   1% /run/lock
/dev/nvme0n1p1    523248     6292    516956   2% /boot/efi
tmpfs            3279684     6224   3273460   1% /run/user/1000
